title: MailerLite vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs AWeber. See pricing, features, ratings & which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: MailerLite and AWeber are both established email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they differ in feature sets, pricing, and target audiences. If you're choosing between these two tools, understanding their strengths and limitations is essential for making the right decision for your business.
choose_a_if: You need e-commerce features and integrations for online stores
You want a modern drag-and-drop editor with landing pages and pop-ups
You prefer more generous free tier limits (1,000 vs 500 subscribers)
You're looking for better overall ratings and user satisfaction
choose_b_if: You're a blogger who wants RSS-to-email functionality
You need AMP email support for interactive email experiences
You prefer established tools with 25+ years of history
You value simplicity and straightforward autoresponders

faq.a: MailerLite edges ahead for most users with a more modern interface, better free tier limits, lower paid pricing, and superior e-commerce features. However, AWeber may be preferable if you specifically need RSS-to-email or AMP email capabilities. Both have strong ratings, with MailerLite at 4.6/5 on G2 versus AWeber's 4.2/5.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or AWeber?
faq.a: MailerLite is cheaper overall, with paid plans starting at $9/month compared to AWeber's $15/month. MailerLite also offers a more generous free tier with 1,000 subscribers versus AWeber's 500. For budget-conscious businesses, MailerLite provides better value at lower price points.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list imports, making migration straightforward. MailerLite provides import tools for CSV files and direct integrations with other platforms. Contact MailerLite support to ensure a smooth transition of your contacts and campaign history if needed.
